title: 8 Herbal Creams For Cold Sore
description: Echinacea purpurea creams contains active constituents like alkylamides, glycoproteins, and polyphenols. These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling and redness associated with cold sores. Alkylamides, in particular, have been shown to inhibit the replication of herpes simplex virus, the virus responsible for cold sores.
